notes: FAIR-MAST Level-2 pf_passive publishes parallelogram geometry (r/z/width/height/shapeAngle1/shapeAngle2) for classic MAST structures but no resistivity. FreeGSNKE passive pickles require resistivity_ohm_m. Populate components only with cited published values (e.g. EFIT/UDA rho) — never invent. Until then passive_coils.pickle stays empty.
